rows.original: [party.som |You find a bench and settle down in it, surprised to find a soft vine that you can lazily drape over your lap. Perhaps undersea currents might make it hard to move around? |You and [companion1.name] find a bench and drop yourselves down, surprised to find soft vines. Men and women of various races walk four-legged sharks, and some literal, swimming sharks with harnesses instead of collars. Sometimes they make for a bathing area that includes not just scrub-downs for their various pets, but a salamander is getting her scales polished, and a lupine man is having some lotion rubbed into his fur... and a particularly punky-looking siorc has her head tilted back far enough to be buried in a larger woman's cleavage while she gets a hair-washing. You could probably indulge in the same treatment, but right now a moment to catch your 'breath' is preferable. Colorful coral, pleased animals... it's an idyllic scene compared to the strife on land. If not for your efforts in slapping the cultists down, this place would've started dying by now. Some of the coral looks a little withered, but it's been shorn fresh to grow slowly again. [pc.isDK |Perhaps you could be refreshed in some way; you've gone down some dark paths since arriving. ]

rows.original:
Entering the bathing hut means being awash in the sound of happy shark-barks, which are more akin to teeth gently clicking together and a fizzing hiss from their gills, and a few giggles and laughs from the attendants. It's not only sharks getting scrubbed with thick brushes and oils that make the water around them 'fragrant', but Starhome's humanoid inhabitants; siorcs, humans, elves, are also getting haircuts or scrub-downs... some of those seem a lot more lurid.
    
    One woman in particular is an incredible specimen of siorc size; a big pink warrior woman, large enough to sit smaller men and women in her lap in order to wash them, or brush their hair. A couple of people give you pleased waves, already familiar with your appearance. From here you could join in playing with the shark puppies, or indulge in a bathing of your own.
rows.translation:
走进沐浴小屋，就会听到鲨鱼们欢快的叫声——那些声音更像是牙齿轻轻碰撞发出的声响，再加上它们鳃部发出的嘶嘶声，再加上服务员们发出的阵阵笑声。让周围的水域变得“芳香”的，不仅仅是那些用粗刷子和油脂清洗的鲨鱼，还有Starhome星球上那些类人的生物：西奥克人、人类以及精灵们，他们也在这里理发或接受身体清洁。其中有些看起来确实格外引人注目。

尤其是有位女性，她堪称是“西奥克”体型中的典型代表——一位身材高大的粉色战士女性，她的体型大到足以让体型较小的男女坐在她的腿上，让她为他们洗澡或梳头。 有几个人向你愉快地招手，他们已经熟悉你的外貌了。从这里开始，你可以加入那些小鲨鱼的游戏中，或者选择自己独自享受游泳的乐趣。

rows.original: [pc.dcb |There's nobody here to see you be a soft bitch for a little while, and the siorcs attending a particularly-wiggly shark seem happy to have you join them. |The sight of a particularly-wiggly shark melts your heart, and a couple of siorcs wave and invite you to join them. How could you not? |You gasp. And then you gasp some more; one of those sharkies is so wiggly. You must pet this shark, and scrub his back, and tell him he's the goodest boy. ] You sink into the fray with reckless abandon, earning nose-boops and tail-slaps for your trouble until they get a brush for you. Immediately the shark flops over onto his side, gills flapping in the aquatic equivalent of happy panting. Shark skin is naturally rough to stroke in one direction, but after a moment's guidance you're shown the ideal way to stroke them... not that you don't wince when the instinct to 'ruffle' the shark's tummy takes you. It's far easier with a scrubby-brush and some heavy oils that cling to the bristles. "Who's a good baby?!" You tease, now with a device to assist you with providing tummy-rubs. You're licked and nearly gnawed on until one of the other siorcs pops a bone in its mouth; the bone looks like it's been hollowed out and filled with fish, [wayfort.hasDaliza |perhaps your Bailiff's pup would like a gift? |which might as well just be a tube of pure drugs. ] The shark quietly chews and chomps his fishy-bone, while you and a couple of the girls scrub his body clean and make sure he's nice and shiny. Before you've even finished, another shark noses in under your arm and licks your face hard enough to knock you over. "Hey wait!" One of the other people in the bathing hut cries out, and you're immediately mobbed by sharks, licking and slurping you while you're on your back. Being underwater doesn't save you from slobber, apparently. Eventually the puppy-pile that is a bunch of siorc sharks and shark-dogs — underwater shovel-heads? It's hard to say — is peeled off of you, shark by shark. "I'm so sorry about that, did you get scratched or bitten?" A particularly handsome hunter crouches down and pulls you to your feet, nearly sending you sailing through the water. He pats you on the back and grins toothily, standing you straight and brushing you down. "Sorry, the sharks always get excited when someone [seastone.isABN |who smells like Seastone |who smells like Seastone |with a fresh face ] turns up." The shark-pup you'd started on brushing looks at you, innocently wagging his tail and munching his fishy-bone. [pc.dcb |You get away with it this time, you adorable bastard. |Guh, how could you stay mad at him? |Aaaah he's just so heckin' precious! ] You reach down and rub the shark's snout, reclaiming the brush you'd been using and using it to wipe slobber from your body. "I'll see you again later, I'm sure." You insist, bopping the pup gently on the snout.

rows.original: You take your time passing from bench to chair, while unsurprisingly-adept siorcs direct you and spot you. For a group of people dedicated to exercising until they're too horny to lift, you expected more groping, but at best there's just plenty of oogling every time you test your limits. Once an hour has passed, you're stopped from climbing back onto a weight bench by a firm hand... and then your body takes the time to tell you that everything aches, gods does it ever ache. You've worked out muscle groups you weren't even sure existed, and for a little while you'll probably pay the price.
